mapper.select: SELECT user_id as userId, username, real_name as realName, password, phone, email, avatar, gender, signature, address, create_time as createTime FROM user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, real_name, password, phone, create_time, status, role, avatar) VALUES (#{username}, #{realName}, #{password}, #{phone}, NOW(), 0, 3, 'default_avatar.png')
mapper.select:
SELECT u.user_id as userId, u.username, u.real_name as realName, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar, u.gender, u.signature, u.address FROM user u
INNER JOIN follow f ON u.user_id = f.following_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 1
INNER JOIN follow f ON u.user_id = f.follower_id WHERE f.following_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 1
ORDER BY f.follow_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow (follower_id, following_id, status) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}, 1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 1
mapper.select: SELECT follow_id FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE following_id = #{userId} AND status = 1

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interaction i1 INNER JOIN post p1 ON i1.post_id = p1.post_id WHERE p1.user_id = #{userId} AND i1.interaction_type = 'like' AND i1.status = 1) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM interaction i2 WHERE i2.user_id = #{userId} AND i2.interaction_type = 'favorite' AND i2.status = 1)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow (follower_id, following_id, status) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 0
mapper.update: DELETE FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId} AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id as userId, u.username, u.real_name as realName, u.phone, u.email, u.avatar, u.gender, u.signature, u.address FROM user u INNER JOIN follow f ON u.user_id = f.following_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{userId} AND f.status = 0 ORDER BY f.follow_id DESC
SELECT follow_id FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId} AND status = 0 LIMIT 1
